messages.content: احتاج ايميل شكر لأحد الأقسام التي دعمت مركز الاتصالات في الحصول على شهادة اعتماد افضل الاماكن للعمل في السعودية لعام 2023

الموضوع: شكر وتقدير على دعم أفضل الأماكن للعمل في السعودية

السادة الأعزاء،

أود أن أعرب عن تقديري العميق وامتناني للجهود الكبيرة التي قدمتموها في دعم مركز الاتصالات للحصول على شهادة اعتماد أفضل الأماكن للعمل في السعودية لعام 2023.

لقد كانت مساهمتكم الفعالة والمستمرة في جعل مركز الاتصالات مكانًا يستحق البقاء في القمة والتفرد في سوق العمل. ونحن ندرك تمامًا أن هذا لم يكن ممكنًا بدون جهودكم ودعمكم اللا محدود.

بإسم مركز الاتصالات وفريق العمل، أشكركم وأتقدم بأطيب التمنيات لكم بمزيد من النجاح في المستقبل.

وتفضلوا بقبول فائق الاحترام،

[الاسم]
بالإنجليزية

Subject: Thank you note for supporting our call center in achieving Best Places to Work accreditation in Saudi Arabia for the year 2023

Dear (Department Name),

I would like to express my deep appreciation and gratitude for the tremendous efforts you have made in supporting our call center to achieve the Best Places to Work accreditation in Saudi Arabia for the year 2023.

Your effective and continuous contribution has made our call center a place worth staying at the top and unique in the job market. We fully recognize that this would not have been possible without your endless efforts and support.

On behalf of the call center and the team, I thank you and extend my best wishes for more success in the future.

Yours sincerely,

[Name]

Revised

I am a dependable person who is great at time management, use a creative approach to
problem solve, always energetic and eager to learn new skills, have experience working
as part of a team and individually, honest and trustworthy, always coming up with
innovative ideas, organized, delivered all projects in a timely fashion, made cost savings
on projects, talented, ambitious, confidence in others and approach new challenges with
an open mind, always highly enthused about my work and tasks ahead, an inspirational
coach, natural leader and developer of people, committed to learning and self development

Revised:

As someone who is highly reliable and skilled in time management, I am confident in my ability to approach problem-solving creatively, both as part of a team and independently. I am also known for my impeccable honesty and trustworthiness, and consistently produce innovative ideas while maintaining an organized work style. My track record includes delivering all projects on time and within budget, as well as finding ways to save costs without sacrificing quality. 

I am highly talented and ambitious, eager to tackle new challenges with an open mind, always enthusiastic about my work and the tasks ahead. Additionally, I bring a natural ability to inspire and coach others, and possess strong leadership skills. I am committed to ongoing learning and self-development to continue advancing my skills and abilities in the workplace.

Revised

Responsible for: leading, executing, analyzing, reporting, and evaluating targeted patient experience improvement initiatives; Active contribution to management of patient experience division in all that would deal directly and indirectly with all patients such as (OPD Management, Reservations and Appointments, Patients Satisfaction, Callers Experience, Building IVR, E-Patient Portal, Clinical and Non-Clinical Codes, Daily Operation, Performance indicators, Service Level, Quality, Productivity, Monitoring, Marketing, Technical Support, Process Improvement)

Revised:

In my role as a patient experience leader, I have been responsible for driving targeted initiatives aimed at enhancing patient satisfaction. This involves leading, executing, analyzing, reporting, and evaluating these initiatives, as well as contributing to overall patient experience division management. 

My responsibilities have encompassed overseeing and managing various areas that directly and indirectly impact the patient experience such as OPD management, reservations and appointments, callers experience, building IVR, E-patient portal, clinical and non-clinical codes, daily operation, performance indicators, service level, quality, productivity, monitoring, marketing, technical support, and process improvement. 

Through my experience, I have built a strong skill set for adapting to changing environments while focusing on driving positive outcomes and results through effective management, communication and collaboration with various team members and stakeholders.

Revised

Management of operating sector in 3 malls (Al Salam Mall, Haifa Mall, Arab Mall) which
including: Ensure the maintenance of malls, Sponsorship of cleaning contracts, Follow-up
security and safety, Marketing and leasing, Questionnaire satisfaction of tenants,
Supervision of tenders and offers, Organizing events and festivals, Collection the invoices
and rents

Revised:

As the operating sector manager for three malls, including Al Salam Mall, Haifa Mall, and Arab Mall, I have been responsible for a range of key duties. This involves overseeing and ensuring the maintenance of these malls, as well as sponsoring cleaning contracts and monitoring security and safety protocols. Additionally, I am involved in key marketing and leasing decisions for these malls.

To ensure tenant satisfaction, I have implemented a comprehensive questionnaire mechanism to gather feedback and make necessary improvements. This includes supervision of tenders and offers, organizing events and festivals, and managing the collection of invoices and rents.

My experience and skills in managing complex operating sectors, as well as my ability to manage multiple tasks and responsibilities, have been essential to my success in this role. I am committed to driving continued growth and success across multiple malls while ensuring a high level of tenant satisfaction and safety and security.

Revised

Establishment of technical support department (determine the required criteria for
candidates, announcement of available career opportunities, select candidates, train staff,
follow up, control, monitor, measure performance indicators, quickly replacment for any
vacancy, Stability the workflow as required)

Revised:

As a technical support manager, my key responsibility involved establishing a new technical support department from the ground up. This included determining the required criteria for potential candidates, announcing available career opportunities, selecting suitable candidates, and training staff to ensure they have the necessary skills to provide high-quality support.

Once the team was in place, my focus shifted towards monitoring and controlling their performance, measuring KPIs to ensure their effectiveness and efficiency in managing technical challenges. I also ensured quick replacement of any vacancy, and stability of the workflow.

My past experience in managing teams, as well as my strong leadership and communication skills, contributed significantly to successfully establishing a new technical support department aligned with the company's objectives, which helped to drive organizational growth and improvement.

Revised

Develop the work of the complaints department from paperwork to electronic work and
improve the quality of staff (training staff on the use of computers, insert of all paper
transactions within the system of customer relations CRM, design incentive system
according to performance indicators for employees, continuous development courses)

Revised:

As a complaints department manager, I played a pivotal role in modernizing and optimizing our department's work processes. This included transitioning from paperwork to electronic work, with a focus on improving the quality of our staff.

To support this, I took steps to train staff on the use of computers and CRM systems, and ensured that all paper transactions were properly entered into the system. I also designed an incentive system based on performance indicators, which motivated and encouraged employees to aim for high standards of work.

A key aspect of the work involved continuous development courses, which I organized to ensure that staff were equipped with the latest skills and knowledge required to meet evolving customer demands. These courses helped our team stay expertise and kept up to date with latest trends, which resulted in the continual enhancement of our department's performance and satisfaction of our customers.

My efforts in driving these changes ultimately helped to enhance customer satisfaction and reduce the overall number of complaints received. They also helped streamline our work processes, leading to greater operational efficiencies and significant cost savings.

Subject: Improvement of complaints department processes and staff quality

Dear [Manager's Name],

I am very excited to apply for the complaints department manager position in your organization. From my research on the company and the role, it has become clear to me that you are committed to delivering an excellent customer experience, which is a goal that I am also passionate about.

During my tenure as a complaints department manager at my previous employer, I developed and implemented several strategies that successfully modernized our department's work processes, improved staff quality, and enhanced the overall customer experience. Specific achievements included:

- Transitioning the department's processes from paperwork to electronic work, using a customer relations CRM system to ensure all paper transactions were recorded

- Providing staff training on the use of computers and CRM systems to improve their technical competency

- Creating an incentive system based on performance indicators, which motivated and encouraged employees to aim for high standards of work

- Organizing continuous development courses to ensure that staff were equipped with the latest skills and knowledge required to meet evolving customer demands

These efforts helped enhance customer satisfaction and reduce the overall number of complaints received. They also streamlined our work processes, leading to greater operational efficiencies and significant cost savings.

I am confident that my experience, skills, and passion make me a great fit for the complaints department manager position in your organization, and I am excited about the opportunity to contribute my expertise to your team.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to discussing my qualifications further with you.

Yours sincerely,
[Your Name]

Revised

Develop the work of the complaints department from paperwork to electronic work and
improve the quality of staff (training staff on the use of computers, insert of all paper
transactions within the system of customer relations CRM, design incentive system
according to performance indicators for employees, continuous development courses)

As a complaints department manager for my previous employer, I led the charge in transitioning our processes from paperwork to electronic work, and worked to improve the overall quality of our staff. Through a variety of strategies, I was able to successfully modernize our department's work processes, increase staff competency, and improve our overall customer experience. 

I began with providing staff training on the use of computers and CRM systems, which helped to improve technical competency and turn around complaints faster. Furthermore, I implemented a customer relations CRM system that enabled us to capture all paper transactions within the system, allowing us to quickly manage and resolve complaints.

Additionally, I created an incentive system based on performance indicators, which helped motivate and encourage employees to maintain high standards of work. This paired with continuous development courses proved to be a highly effective way of keeping staff engaged and up-to-date with new trends and techniques in complaints management.

Overall, the combination of these strategies helped to enhance customer satisfaction and reduce the number of complaints received. It also helped streamline our work processes, leading to greater operational efficiencies and significant cost savings.

These experiences have equipped me with the skills, knowledge and demonstrated success required for the position of Complaints Department Manager. My passion for customer experience, commitment to employee training, and working with technology systems ensures that I am an effective and efficient leader in any complaints department.

Possible revised email:

Subject: Applying for the role of Complaints Department Manager

Dear [Hiring Manager's Name],

I am excited to apply for the Complaints Department Manager position that I saw listed on your website. I believe that my experience, skills, and passion for excellent customer service make me a strong candidate for this role.

In my previous position as a Complaints Department Manager, I developed and implemented several initiatives designed to modernize our processes and improve staff quality. These included:

- Transitioning our work processes from paperwork to electronic files, utilizing a customer relations CRM system to ensure transactions were recorded, and reducing errors and inaccuracies resulting from manual work.

- Providing comprehensive training programs to staff members on computer skills, CRM usage and data analysis to improve technical capabilities, and overall performance.

- Implementing an incentive system based on performance indicators and customer satisfaction metrics, which helped motivate and promote a positive work culture among the team. 

- Designing and offering ongoing training and development courses that addressed new trends and best practices for complaint resolution, ensuring not only the speedy resolution of complaints but also personal growth and development opportunities for staff.

These initiatives resulted in enhanced service quality, increased resolution rates, and more engaged and empowered staff members.

I am confident that these experiences, coupled with my passion for delivering excellent customer service, make me well-suited for this position. I welcome the opportunity to discuss my qualifications and how I can contribute to your organization's continued success in this role.

Thank you for your consideration. I look forward to speaking with you further.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]

Revised

Develop the work of the complaints department from paperwork to electronic work and
improve the quality of staff (training staff on the use of computers, insert of all paper
transactions within the system of customer relations CRM, design incentive system
according to performance indicators for employees, continuous development courses)

Dear [Hiring Manager’s Name],

I am writing to express my interest in the role of Complaints Department Manager that was advertised on your company website. I am confident that my experience and skills make me an ideal fit for this position.

As a Complaints Manager at my previous employer, I led the transformation of our department's processes from paperwork to electronic work. I implemented a customer relations CRM system, which enabled our team to efficiently manage complaints and provide timely resolutions to customers.

By providing staff training on the use of computers and CRM systems, I was able to improve my team's technical competency and optimize workflows. Furthermore, I designed an incentive system, based on performance indicators, that motivated employees to maintain high standards of excellence. Continuous development courses were also implemented, which proved highly effective in keeping our team engaged and up-to-speed with the latest trends and techniques in complaints management.

My previous experience, combined with my effective leadership and passion for excellent customer service, make me an excellent candidate for this position. I am confident that my expertise in implementing changes in departmental processes, improving staff skills, and implementing incentive systems will benefit your team.

Thank you for reviewing my application. I would be excited for the opportunity to further discuss my qualifications, and how I can contribute to the success of your organization.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]

Revised

Build up a huge Contact Center for the local and international stock trading department
for NCB and transfer this Contact Center instead of be outsourcing to be insourcing as well
as to attracting the best talent to be directly contracted with NCB (hiring a large number
of employees ~ 150 staff, bringing training companies from outside KSA specialized in the
field of contact centers to train these employees before they start work, periodic workshops
on the job, continuously follow up, calls coaching, daily monitoring reports, immediate
replacement of uncontrolled employees, retention plan for outstanding employees,
permanent meetings and ongoing updates with the NCB)

Revised:

As a Contact Center Manager for NCB, I have successfully built a contact center for the local and international stock trading department, transforming the process from outsourcing to insourcing. In doing so, I have led the recruitment of a large number of employees, up to 150 staff, and worked to attract and retain the best talent to work directly with NCB.

To ensure that employees were properly trained and prepared to serve customers, I brought training companies from outside KSA, who were specialized in the field of contact centers, to train the staff before they started their work. I also conducted periodic workshops and coaching sessions to ensure that staff were continuously improving their skills and providing the best possible customer experience. Daily monitoring reports and immediate replacement of uncontrolled employees were put in place to maintain optimum performance and enhance the efficiency of the team.

Additionally, retention plans were developed to recognize and reward outstanding employees, and permanent meetings and ongoing updates with NCB were conducted to ensure that we were maintaining alignment with the company's objectives.

These initiatives have helped to create an efficient, high-performing, and innovative team that has been able to overcome every challenge. My experience in building, motivating, and managing contact centers has equipped me with the skills needed to excel in any organization's Contact Center department.

I am eager to share my expertise and experience with NCB. I believe that my talent for developing and managing Contact Centers, attracting and retaining top talent, and keeping employees engaged, motivated, and well-trained can propel NCB's Contact Center to greater heights. I am excited to further discuss my qualifications and how I can contribute to your organization's success in this position.

Thank you for your consideration.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
